_publications._publicationTitle: NF1 deficiency drives metabolic reprogramming in ER+ breast cancer.

_contextSnippet: we found that NF1 deficiency dramatically increased active T202/Y204-phosphorylated ERK, which is indicative of increased RAS-pathway signaling
details: NF1 deficiency in MCF7 cells dramatically increased active T202/Y204-phosphorylated ERK, indicative of increased RAS-pathway signaling
